calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for Portfolio Recovery Associates.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Michelle Tam.
Declaration of Evita Rodriguez pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates and against Defendant Michelle Tam as follows:
Damages $ 3,847.51
Costs $ 284.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $ 4,131.51
Judgment signed in open court. (See scanned judgment for details)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
